app.name: wiidestroyboxes
app.long_description:
Wiidestroyboxes is my DofE project that will run on the Wii and dolphin emulator. The game will be about destroying boxes in a short amount of time by using with the Wii remotes.
Controls: (A) or (B) attack
Todo: - fix player 4 - Main menu - pvp mode - powerups boxes
